title: Imposition of monetary penalty: Svarog Shipping & Trading Company Limited
body: "On 11 April 2025, the Office of Financial Sanctions Implementation (OFSI), part of HM Treasury, imposed a monetary penalty of £5,000 on the UK-registered company Svarog Shipping & Trading Company Limited (“Svarog”) in accordance with section 146 of the Policing and Crime Act 2017 (“PACA”). Svarog breached regulation 74(1)(a) of The Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) by failing, without reasonable excuse, to respond to a regulation 72 request issued by OFSI within the required timeframe. "
